name: EMSProcedureContext
title: EMS Procedure Context
description: Contextual data for NEMSIS eProcedures not directly representable in FHIR Procedure: prior EMS care indicator, number of attempts, clinical response, authorization type, airway technique(s), and performed-by-another-unit indicator.

element.definition: Contextual data for NEMSIS eProcedures not directly representable in FHIR Procedure: prior EMS care indicator, number of attempts, clinical response, authorization type, airway technique(s), and performed-by-another-unit indicator.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children
Must have either extensions or value[x], not both

element.definition: Unique id for the element within a resource (for internal references). This may be any string value that does not contain spaces.

slicing.description: Extensions are always sliced by (at least) url

element.definition: May be used to represent additional information that is not part of the basic definition of the element. To make the use of extensions safe and manageable, there is a strict set of governance  applied to the definition and use of extensions. Though any implementer can define an extension, there is a set of requirements that SHALL be met as part of the definition of the extension.
element.comment: There can be no stigma associated with the use of extensions by any application, project, or standard - regardless of the institution or jurisdiction that uses or defines the extensions.  The use of extensions is what allows the FHIR specification to retain a core level of simplicity for everyone.

constraint.human: All FHIR elements must have a @value or children

element.definition: An Extension
element.comment: NEMSIS eProcedures.02. Usage: Required/National. Nillable. NV: NotRecorded, NotApplicable.

element.definition: Contextual data for NEMSIS eProcedures not directly representable in FHIR Procedure: prior EMS care indicator, number of attempts, clinical response, authorization type, airway technique(s), and performed-by-another-unit indicator.

element.short: eProcedures.02 - Procedure Performed Prior to this Unit's EMS Care
element.comment: NEMSIS eProcedures.02. Usage: Required/National. Nillable. NV: NotRecorded, NotApplicable.
NEMSIS eProcedures.05. Usage: Required/National. Nillable. NV: NotRecorded, NotApplicable. Integer count of attempts.
NEMSIS eProcedures.06. Usage: Required/National. Nillable. NV: NotRecorded, NotApplicable. YesNoValues mapped to v2-0136 Y/N.
NEMSIS eProcedures.08. Usage: Required/National. Nillable. NV: NotRecorded, NotApplicable.
NEMSIS eProcedures.11. Usage: Optional. How the procedure was authorized.
NEMSIS eProcedures.14. Usage: Recommended. Nillable. NV: NotRecorded, NotApplicable. Repeating (0..M). Required when procedure is an airway placement.

element.short: eProcedures.15 - Procedure Performed by Another Unit
element.comment: NEMSIS eProcedures.15. Usage: Recommended. Nillable. NV: NotRecorded, NotApplicable.
